section.title: Everything You Need to Succeed
section.subtitle: Powerful features designed for modern businesses

list.title: Native Mobile App
list.description: Built with React Native for seamless iOS and Android experience. Access your business data anytime, anywhere with our lightning-fast mobile application.

list.title: Comprehensive Web Dashboard
list.description: Full-featured React dashboard with real-time analytics, advanced reporting, and intuitive data visualization to make informed decisions.

list.title: Loyalty Program
list.description: Reward your customers with points, discounts, and exclusive benefits. Build lasting relationships and increase customer lifetime value.

list.title: Real-Time Synchronization
list.description: All your data syncs instantly across mobile and web platforms. Work seamlessly from any device without missing a beat.

list.title: Team Collaboration
list.description: Invite team members, assign roles, and collaborate efficiently with built-in communication tools and permission management.

list.title: Accessibility
list.description: Inclusive design with comprehensive accessibility features. Our mobile app includes high-contrast theme, TalkBack optimization, and detailed labels for an accessible experience for all users.

list.title: Advanced Analytics
list.description: Get deep insights into your business with customizable reports, charts, and KPI tracking that help you grow faster.

list.title: Real Time Chat Support
list.description: Integrated real-time chat to communicate directly with your customers. Provide instant support and build stronger relationships.

infrastructure.title: Infrastructure & Cost Coverage Per Client

features: App Store publishing (Google Play + Apple Developer Program)

section.title: Choose Your Perfect Plan
section.subtitle: Scalable pricing that grows with your business

plans.name: Enterprise Pro
features: New features: Included at no additional cost

items.question: What does 'infrastructure cost coverage' mean?
items.answer: We invest in dedicated cloud infrastructure for your business. These amounts represent our infrastructure costs covered by us - you benefit from enterprise-grade AWS resources without managing them.

items.question: What is the commission?
items.answer: Depending on your plan, we take a small percentage of your total processed transactions. This allows us to align our success with yours.

items.question: Can I upgrade or downgrade anytime?
items.answer: Yes! You can change your plan at any time. Changes take effect immediately, and we'll adjust charges proportionally.

items.question: What about new features - are they always charged?
items.answer: Most new features are included in the Enterprise plan. Basic and Professional plans charge a recurring monthly fee for additional features developed for your needs.

ctaSection.title: Ready to Transform Your Business?
ctaSection.description: Join thousands of businesses already using Sostentia Desk to streamline their operations and boost productivity.

hero.title: Building the Future of Business Management
hero.subtitle: We're on a mission to empower businesses with intuitive, powerful tools that drive growth and efficiency.

story.title: Our Story
story.content:
We believe that great businesses deserve better tools. Sostentia was born from a simple but powerful insight: teams were losing countless hours navigating fragmented platforms, struggling with data that didn't sync, and managing operations across disconnected systems.

So we built differently. We created a unified platform that brings everything together—mobile app, web dashboard, real-time analytics, and customer insights—all synchronized and accessible from anywhere. Our mission is to give every business, regardless of size, enterprise-grade tools that make complexity simple.

But technology alone isn't enough. We believe in real relationships. That's why we're committed to person-to-person support, ensuring you're never just a ticket number. We succeed when you succeed, and we're here to support every step of your growth journey.

Since 2024, we've been obsessed with one thing: eliminating the friction between you and your data, between your team and their goals. Because when your team has the right tools and the right support, there's nothing you can't achieve.
